pages.text: $(l)Best Combos:$()$(br2)$(l)Vampire Chain$(): Chain + Blood + Lifesteal$(br)Bouncing drain across 4 targets$(br2)$(l)Time Stop Field$(): Nova + Time + Slow Field$(br)Freezes everything in radius$(br2)$(l)Death Rain$(): Rain + Void + Multishot$(br)24 wither bolts from the sky$(br2)$(l)Eldritch Sniper$(): Arrow + Eldritch + Amplify$(br)12 damage + wither + blind in one shot

$(l)Guardian Summon$(): Summon + Holy + Summon Guardian$(br)Spawns armored holy guardian$(br2)$(l)Chaos Dash$(): Dash + Chaos + Unstable$(br)Teleport through enemies with wild damage$(br2)$(l)Acid Breath$(): Breath + Acid + Lingering$(br)Cone spray + armor break + poison cloud$(br2)Total: 17 x 18 x 32 = $(l)9,792$() combinations!
